name: serena
description: Connects the Serena MCP server to Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Semantic code tools for Codex via Serena MCP.
interface.longDescription: Starts the Serena MCP server in Codex-compatible mode so Codex can use Serena's semantic retrieval and editing tools.
defaultPrompt: Activate Serena for the current project.
Use Serena to inspect code semantically.
Use Serena editing tools for targeted refactors.
